element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary ranged combat tool throughout game
High-damage explosive weapon with secondary modes
Reveals position to enemies; risk/reward puzzle element
Required for traversal on slippery surfaces
Damage mitigation layer separate from health
Boss-tier armored antagonists representing project climax
Physical obstacle navigation between combat areas

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe room with no enemies
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Mission-based structure with alternating combat and exploration phases; early missions establish baseline tension, escalating through mid-game enemy variety and complexity, culminating in Dark Trooper encounters and story climax

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Branching paths in multi-floor levels; some objectives allow reconnaissance before engagement

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-focused with basic blaster combat, introduction to level navigation and simple puzzles; lower enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of diverse enemy types, more complex multi-floor level design, expanded weapon arsenal, environmental hazards requiring resource management (headlamp battery, air mask, ice cleats)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dark Trooper encounters representing project culmination; combination of advanced enemy AI, complex level architecture, puzzle sequences requiring prior exploration knowledge

notable_level_patterns.description: Interior military structure with predictable guard patterns, multiple deck levels, objective-based navigation
High-security facility requiring stealth awareness and puzzle solving to access central objective
Levels emphasizing traversal challenges (ice, toxic atmosphere) requiring specific equipment items before combat escalates
Late-game levels featuring elite armored enemy encounters in controlled environments; culminates story arc
